title: Southern California taps AI to issue hefty street parking fines
description: Santa Monica is the first California city to use artificial intelligence-enabled cameras to issue tickets for cars blocking bike lanes, with fines clocking in at $93.
content:
They’re robo-cops.
Santa Monica has become the first city in California to crack down on bike lane violations using security cams powered by artificial intelligence.

title: Calgary police warn of AI images, video
description: If you’re using artificial intelligence to create or edit materials related to the search for Parker Wells, just stop, Calgary police ask.
content:
If you’re using artificial intelligence to create or edit materials related to the search for Parker Wells, just stop, Calgary police ask.

title: Missing ancestry data in single-cell atlases threatens fair medicine
description: The single-cell "atlases" that are increasingly used to map the human body and as training data for artificial intelligence models, may not represent the world's populations fairly, according to a study led by researchers at the Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai.
